Stack's Bowers Galleries (& Ponterio) - January 2026 NYINC Auction, Lot 40003 — GAUL. Baiocassi. EL Stater (7.33 gms), ca. 2nd-1st Centuries B.C. NGC VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed.
Roth (BNJ 1912)-p. 8, 1 (this coin); cf. LT-6982; cf. D&T-2254-5. Obverse: Celticized head
sales.description:
GAUL. Baiocassi. EL Stater (7.33 gms), ca. 2nd-1st Centuries B.C. NGC VF, Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5. Brushed.
Roth (BNJ 1912)-p. 8, 1 (this coin); cf. LT-6982; cf. D&T-2254-5. Obverse: Celticized head right with boar above, standing right; ornamental border to right; Reverse: Celticized biga right with abstract charioteer; vexillum to right; below, boar standing right. An EXTREMELY RARE electrum issuance showcasing a highly stylized design. Slightly overcleaned surfaces, though they retain a ni...
